title: 10 medicinal preparations of Hippophae rhamnoides

intro: Hippophae rhamnoides has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, that are useful for various health benefits. The plant's berries and seeds are rich in antioxidants, fatty acids, and vitamins, making them effective in treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions like eczema and acne. The tea is also consumed to soothe respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, while the tincture is used to support liver health and reduce inflammation.
